dialguesToLoad.text: Yeah. I saw it in a dream. Granpa wandered in here with a man in a red coat.
You saw it in a dream? Lea, do you believe this?
See! She believes me! You're a pal, Lea.
Yeah, well, gear up. I see Pluvials.
Right. Let's deal with them quickly. I haven't fought in a while.
It wouldn't be the case if you actually attended training sessions.
Be careful, one of them is coming this way.
Ok, here I go. Watch me take him down !
